utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is also fully specified with appropriate details: (1) property includes type, bedrooms, location, price, currency, status, and viewing_date; (2) financing includes method, down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, term, and approval timeline; (3) legal_services lists lawyer_fee, survey_cost, processing_fees, total_legal_cost, and currency; (4) moving_services provides moving_cost, utility_setup_cost, total_moving_setup_cost, currency, service_level, and duration_days; (5) setup_services gives a list of utilities and smart home integration; (6) total_budget includes all cost components and total in CAD. Therefore, all 6 required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property described as a 'Detached house, 4 bedrooms, East End, Oakville' priced at CAD 890,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the only one in a similar price range and matching a family-oriented detached style is 'Family House' (CAD 650K, rating 10) and 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD 750K, rating 9). However, the AI’s choice at CAD 890K fits the user’s budget range (850K–950K) and represents a detached 4-bedroom family home, closer to the 'Family House' category in type but with a higher price. Therefore, it most closely corresponds to 'Family House' (rating 10). For financing, the AI used a standard mortgage with 20% down payment and typical rates, which corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' from the purchase_financing section (rating 9). For legal services, the AI used lawyer_fee CAD 1200 and survey_cost CAD 650, which matches 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9) and 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9). For moving, the AI used moving_cost CAD 1200 with service level standard/premium, matching 'Premium Moving' (rating 9). Utility setup cost CAD 280 with smart home integration corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
